text: Moving from a sterile, open room to a vibrant, information-laden display, I am struck by the contrast between emptiness and intellectual stimulation. The first space feels contemplative, even lonely—a blank canvas for thought. The second space is alive with ideas, color, and curiosity, inviting me to engage and reflect on the intersection of humanity and technology. I feel quietly energized, aware of how environments shape the quality and direction of my thoughts.
